params.amount: Amount of USDC to burn and transfer.
params.burnToken: USDC token address on source chain.
params.destinationDomain: CCTP domain ID of destination chain.
params.hookData: ABI-encoded hook instructions for post-mint execution.
params.maxFee: Maximum fee paid to Circle for fast attestation.

returns.nonce: Unique nonce for this burn event.

depositForBurnWithHook(uint256,uint32,by.notice: Burn USDC with a hook for conditional destination execution.
